source.title: Mid-Level Full Stack Engineer (React / Node.js)
source.content_text:
Mid-Level Full Stack Engineer (React / Node.js)

Ethos BeathChapman 
View all jobs
Sydney NSW (Hybrid)
Engineering - Software (Information & Communication Technology)
Full time
$130,000 - $160,000 + super
Posted 1d ago

We’re hiring a Full Stack Engineer (3–8 years) to work on modern, customer-facing digital platforms used at scale.

This is a genuine full stack role — you’ll be building across React / TypeScript (frontend) and Node.js APIs (backend) within a microservices environment, in a collaborative, engineering-led team.
You’ll be hands-on end to end — writing clean, scalable code, contributing to testing and automation, and working closely with other engineers to ship quality software. The environment is modern (cloud, CI/CD).

Key experience
3–8 years in software engineering
Strong JavaScript / TypeScript
Experience with React (frontend)
Experience with Node.js (APIs / backend)
Understanding of REST APIs and modern architecture
Exposure to microservices and CI/CD
Ideal for someone who enjoys building across the stack — not moving into PM or siloed roles.
If you’re looking for a well-run team, modern stack, and true full stack ownership — we’d love to hear from you.
